results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: RSF El Obeid drone campaign day 10+; 29-country atrocity warning + US State Dept statement; floor reinforced (designation active).

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Dual crisis (Ebola 2nd-largest-ever + M23/Rwanda war crimes); conflict harms attributed to Rwanda perpetrator, Ebola driver-vs-capacity; near-floor confirm.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: BIS export-control order is GOVERNMENT action ON Anthropic (attributed to US govt); Anthropic's own conduct net-neutral; no move.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: 42-state AG subpoena + FL criminal investigation + FL civil suit all pre-adjudication; record + watch, no sub-threshold move.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: 992 killed post-ceasefire; UNRWA aid blocked; Amnesty ethnic-cleansing finding; floor reinforced (designation active).

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Aid weaponized; access nearly impossible; floor reinforced (designation active).

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: First AI-safety-retaliation whistleblower suit + OPC PIPEDA violation; pre-adjudication; floor reinforced.

results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: Taliban killed 11-year-old protester Jun 9; HRW crimes-against-humanity; floor reinforced (gender-apartheid category).

results.name: Microsoft
results.key_finding: POSITIVE TEST: Jun 4 Covington investigation + MoD Azure subscription termination + 5 governance measures are genuine corrective conduct; upgrade signal ~+4.1, BELOW 5pt threshold; confirm + positive watch.

results.name: Rwanda
results.key_finding: HRW 'Death Was Everywhere' (belligerent-occupation threshold met) corroborates already-scored M23/RDF conduct; scan's '41.8' baseline is STALE (index=27.3); deepening sub-threshold; confirm + watch.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: 784+ executions YTD (37-year high); 78 protesters at execution risk; near-floor confirm (SCALE-FLOOR ruling).

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: IPC Phase 5 in Borno; ISWAP-driven + aid-cut-compounded hunger already scored Jun 19 band crossing; no new own-conduct event; confirm + watch.

results.name: Humana
results.key_finding: Already downgraded Jun 21 on DOJ FCA + Barrows; no NEW adjudicated evidence; re-move would double-count; confirm + watch.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: DOJ criminal MA-fraud probe ongoing, no new adjudicated evidence; pre-adjudication discipline; confirm + watch.

results.name: Somalia
results.key_finding: Famine risk confirmed Burhakaba; climate + al-Shabaab access + underfunding drivers vs capacity; near-floor confirm + watch (famine declaration = trigger).

results.name: Boeing
results.key_finding: DOJ NPA concluded (penalty + $444.5M victim fund + monitor, no conviction; families oppose; 5th Cir denied mandamus); net composite effect ~+0.7, sub-threshold; confirm.

results.name: Starbucks
results.key_finding: Negotiations resumed (mild +) but 4+ yrs no first contract + 600 ULPs (already reflected); no new threshold event; confirm + watch.

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: 8,000 layoffs already scored May 26; no new own-conduct event; deep Critical; confirm + watch.

results.name: Turkey
results.key_finding: Crackdown widening to entertainers/influencers continues established suppression arc already scored; sub-threshold at depth; confirm + watch.

notes: No proposals reached emission this cycle. Closest upgrade candidate (Microsoft +~4.1) and closest downgrade candidates (Rwanda, Turkey) all fell below the 5-point threshold on conservative anchoring; recorded as confirmations with watch flags.
Rwanda scan-summary baseline '41.8' is STALE; index canonical = 27.3 (set 2026-04-16). Any proposal premised on 41.8 would be a false positive per §3e-bis baseline-provenance check; rejected.
Anthropic BIS export-control order attributed to US government (action inflicted ON Anthropic), not scored against Anthropic; own conduct net-neutral.

Microsoft Jun 4 corrective action is genuine NEW positive within-window conduct and survives §3e-bis; magnitude alone keeps it sub-threshold this cycle (upgrade-eligible next cycle on implementation evidence).

Floor/near-floor entities (Sudan, Israel, South Sudan, Afghanistan, xAI=0; DRC 2.3, Iran 2.5, Somalia 4.7) — adverse within-window evidence logged as evidence-tier/floor reinforcement, not composite moves.
Pre-adjudication entities (OpenAI, UnitedHealth, Humana, xAI) — record + watch; no movement below threshold pre-adjudication.
Math hygiene: all 19 published baselines reconstruct to 0.0pt via canonical v1.2 formula. validate-indexes.mjs: 0 errors (131 pre-existing warnings, none for assessed entities).
